calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification And Amendment Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-11-2024 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Modification And Amendment Of Trust
Off Calendar Jan-08-2024 Continued To Mar-11-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared by zoom for petitioner.

The court noted that there have been no filings since the case title was corrected in October. Mrs. Lam stated that they have finalized the petition and that they plan to file in the next week or so. The Petition for Modification and Amendment of Trust is continued to March 11, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

Petition For Modification And Amendment Of Trust
Off Calendar Oct-11-2023 Continued To Jan-08-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Kristina Lam appeared via zoom for Charles Sungwon Han (petitioner).

Ms. Lam stated that they will be filing an ex parte petition to amend the petition to file the right title, and that she will be addressing the outstanding issues. Petition for modification and amendment of trust is continued to January 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: A. Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.
